CBDT notifies Cost Inflation Index of 384 for FY27: Who can claim indexation benefits and how it affects capital gains tax
results.description: The CBDT has notified the Cost Inflation Index (CII) at 384 for FY2026-27, a key number used to calculate inflation-adjusted long-term capital gains for eligible taxpayers. While indexation is no longer available for most new assets, the revised CII could help certain property sellers reduce their tax liability.
